title_original: トヨタ ランドクルーザー70 配線図集
title_normalized_en: Toyota Land Cruiser 70 Electrical Wiring Diagram
notes: Source-catalog record only. This is a January 1995 Japanese-market publication stated to apply to KZJ7#, PZJ7#, and HZJ7# production from May 1993. It does not establish applicability to a 1990 PZJ70 and does not contain accepted translation or graph knowledge.
